entrance_lobby.name: Entrance Lobby
entrance_lobby.description: The entrance lobby of the university research lab is bright and welcoming, with sleek modern decor. A bulletin board displays various research announcements, and a faint buzz of conversation can be heard in the distance.

hallway.name: Hallway
hallway.description: The hallway is long and narrow, lined with doors to various labs and offices. Fluorescent lights hum overhead, casting a sterile glow on the beige walls. The air feels charged with academic tension.

lab_of_shadows.name: Lab of Shadows
lab_of_shadows.description: In the cold, sterile lab of Dr. Emily Carter, shadows dance across the walls as fluorescent lights flicker ominously. This once-bustling research environment now feels eerie and abandoned, as if secrets linger in the air.

break_room.name: Break Room
break_room.description: The break room is a cozy enclave within the lab, filled with the aroma of coffee and the sound of a microwave humming. A small table sits in the corner, surrounded by chairs, offering a place for researchers to unwind.

security_office.name: Security Office
security_office.description: The dimly lit security office is filled with monitors displaying various feeds from around the labs. The soft glow of the screens highlights the cluttered desk, where evidence from the investigation lies scattered.

evidence_room.name: Evidence Room
evidence_room.description: The evidence room is a stark, sterile space where crucial clues are stored. Papers and vials are neatly organized on shelves, but a sense of foreboding hangs in the air, hinting at the secrets they contain.

coffee_mug_emily.name: Coffee Mug
coffee_mug_emily.description: A ceramic mug with a faded inscription of 'Emily' on the side, stained with a dark liquid. It sits in the coffee station, slightly chipped.

security_camera_footage.name: Security Camera Footage
security_camera_footage.description: A dusty old tape labeled 'Lab Security - March 5th'. It appears to have been recently reviewed, with a few frame cuts visible.

toxicology_report.name: Toxicology Report
toxicology_report.description: A folded report with the title 'Toxicology Analysis Results'. The text is densely packed with medical jargon, but some words stand out ominously.

witness_statement_jennifer.name: Witness Statement
witness_statement_jennifer.description: A typed document detailing an account of an argument overheard in the lab. The words 'argument' and 'Michael' jump out at you.

lab_records_michael.name: Lab Access Records
lab_records_michael.description: A printed log showing entries and exits from the lab. Michael's access to restricted areas is highlighted, with an unsettling timestamp.

access_log_michael.name: Late-night Access Log
access_log_michael.description: A digital log file that shows Michael's late-night entry into the lab. The timestamp contradicts his alibi, raising suspicion.

forensic_report_neurotoxin.name: Forensic Report
forensic_report_neurotoxin.description: A detailed forensic analysis that outlines traces found in the coffee cup. It seems to point in a different direction than expected.

email_screenshots_mark.name: Email Screenshots
email_screenshots_mark.description: A collection of printed emails that hint at a disagreement. They seem to depict a contentious relationship between Mark and Emily.

methodology_notes_jennifer.name: Methodology Notes
methodology_notes_jennifer.description: A stack of notes detailing various research methodologies. They are scribbled with comments suggesting disagreements but lack context.

coffee_station.name: Coffee Station
coffee_station.description: A small area with a coffee maker and various supplies. It feels cozy, yet there's an unsettling vibe lingering in the air.

desk_security_office.name: Security Desk
desk_security_office.description: A cluttered desk with monitors displaying various feeds. It's the hub for all security activities in the building, but feels neglected.

break_room_table.name: Break Room Table
break_room_table.description: A round table surrounded by mismatched chairs. It has seen many conversations, some of which may have been tense.

lab_equipment.name: Lab Equipment
lab_equipment.description: Various pieces of scientific equipment are scattered around. They seem to have been used recently, with some still warm to the touch.

hidden_lab_key.name: Hidden Lab Key
hidden_lab_key.description: A small, rusted key that seems to fit a specific lock.

mitchell.name: Dr. Sarah Mitchell
mitchell.description: A tall woman with curly brown hair and glasses, currently examining some lab equipment with a furrowed brow.

suspect_data.alibi: She claims she was in the library studying during the murder.
suspect_data.motive: Sarah had previously collaborated with Emily but was overlooked for a promotion that Emily received, creating a motive rooted in jealousy.
suspect_data.means: Access to all lab materials and equipment needed for experiments, including poisons used in research.

thompson.name: Dr. Mark Thompson
thompson.description: A young man with short blond hair and a nervous demeanor, currently sorting through a pile of lab reports at the desk.

suspect_data.alibi: He claims to have been taking inventory in the main office during the murder.
suspect_data.motive: Mark had a secret crush on Emily and felt heartbroken after she rejected his advances.
suspect_data.means: Frequent access to all lab areas and knowledge of chemical combinations.

lee.name: Dr. Jennifer Lee
lee.description: An Asian woman with shoulder-length black hair, visibly tense, currently pacing around the room while glancing at her notes.

suspect_data.alibi: Claims to have been in the break room during the time of the murder.
suspect_data.motive: She recently had a public argument with Emily regarding research integrity, which caused her to harbor resentment.
suspect_data.means: Has access to the lab's coffee supplies and works with the same equipment as Emily.

reynolds.name: Dr. Michael Reynolds
reynolds.description: A tall man with graying hair and a stern expression, currently sitting at a desk with his arms crossed, looking deep in thought.

suspect_data.alibi: He states he was in a meeting, confirmed by several colleagues.
suspect_data.motive: He killed Emily out of personal betrayal after she rejected him for a colleague, leading to feelings of inadequacy and rage.
suspect_data.means: He has the highest level of access to the lab and control over the equipment.

look.name: look
look.description: Look around the current room. Lists objects, NPCs, and exits.
preconditions: player is in a room
effects: display current room description

examine.name: examine
examine.description: Look closely at an object or NPC.
preconditions: target is in the current room OR in inventory
target is visible (not hidden inside a closed container)
effects: display target description
if target is_clue and player has not yet discovered clue_id: discover the clue
if target is_red_herring: mark as encountered

pick_up.name: pick_up
pick_up.description: Pick up an object and put it in inventory.
preconditions: target is in the current room
target is portable (state.weight in {light, medium})
target is not nailed down or affixed
effects: move target to inventory

drop.name: drop
drop.description: Drop an object from inventory into the current room.
preconditions: target is in inventory
effects: move target to current room

move.name: move
move.description: Move to an adjacent room. Direction is the target.
preconditions: current room has a connection in the named direction
the connecting passage is not locked
effects: update player_location to the connected room

talk.name: talk
talk.description: Speak with an NPC about a topic from their dialogue_topics.
preconditions: target NPC is in the current room
NPC.state.alive == true
NPC.state.willing_to_talk == true
effects: NPC responds with information about the topic
may reveal a clue if the topic and NPC's knowledge align
may debunk a red herring if the conversation does so

use.name: use
use.description: Use an object, optionally on another object or NPC.
preconditions: target is in inventory or in the current room
effects: effect depends on target — may reveal a clue or unlock something

give.name: give
give.description: Give an object from inventory to an NPC.
preconditions: target object is in inventory
target NPC is in the current room
effects: move object from inventory to npc:<id>

inventory.name: inventory
inventory.description: List the objects you are carrying.
effects: display inventory

accuse.name: accuse
accuse.description: Accuse an NPC of being the murderer. Ends the game.
preconditions: discovered_clues count >= accusation_threshold
target NPC is a suspect
effects: if target is the criminal: outcome = won
if target is innocent: outcome = lost
set game_over = true

help.name: help
effects: print list of base verbs

search_lab_equipment.name: search_lab_equipment
search_lab_equipment.description: Thoroughly search the lab equipment for hidden items or clues.
preconditions: player is in the lab_of_shadows
lab equipment is in the current room
effects: player finds a hidden clue: 'Hidden Lab Key'

burn_toxicology_report.name: burn_toxicology_report
burn_toxicology_report.description: Attempt to burn the toxicology report using a fire source.
preconditions: player is in the evidence_room
toxicology_report is in the current room
a fire source is available in the current room or in inventory
effects: toxicology_report is destroyed

pick_lock_security_desk.name: pick_lock_security_desk
pick_lock_security_desk.description: Attempt to pick the lock on the security desk.
preconditions: player is in the security_office
security_desk is in the current room
player has a lock-picking tool in inventory
effects: If successful, the security desk is unlocked and can be examined for contents.

with sleek modern decor. A bulletin board displays various research
announcements, and a faint buzz of conversation can be heard in the distance.
Exits: north, east.

content.reasoning: look command
The action of looking around in the entrance lobby does not advance or threaten any unresolved plot points, as it is a neutral action.

== Lab of Shadows ==
In the cold, sterile lab of Dr. Emily Carter, shadows dance across the walls

environment now feels eerie and abandoned, as if secrets linger in the air.
You see: Coffee Mug, Methodology Notes, Coffee Station, Lab Equipment.
Present: Dr. Sarah Mitchell.
Exits: south, west.

content.reasoning: The input directly corresponds to the action of examining an object, which is a known action in the game.
Examining the coffee mug will reveal that it has Emily's name on it, which is a critical clue pointing to her presence in the lab before her death.

transcript.content: A ceramic mug with a faded inscription of 'Emily' on the side, stained with a dark liquid. It sits in the coffee station, slightly chipped.

clue.description: A coffee mug with Emily's name on it found in the lab's coffee station
clue.points_to: Indicates Emily was in the lab at the time of her murder.
clue.discovery_method: Witnesses saw Emily in the lab before her death.

content.reasoning: The input 'talk to mitchell' directly corresponds to the available action of talking to an NPC.
Talking to Dr. Sarah Mitchell, a suspect, may provide valuable information or lead to further clues, thus advancing the investigation.

transcript.content: "She claims she was in the library studying during the murder." Dr. Sarah Mitchell pauses. "Look, I had no reason to want them dead."

The player is examining a red herring, which will now be encountered but does not advance the main plot or reveal any clues.

transcript.content: A stack of notes detailing various research methodologies. They are scribbled with comments suggesting disagreements but lack context.

content.description: A lab report with Jennifer's notes was found crumpled in Emily's wastebasket with annotations about Emily's experiments.
content.planted_evidence: The notes appear to indicate disagreements on methodologies that could have led to a confrontation.
content.debunk_method: Forensic analysis shows that the crumpled notes were dated weeks before the murder and had nothing to do with the current project, demonstrating no immediate motive.

content.reasoning: The input describes a specific action of searching that does not match any existing rules but is a plausible action in the context of the game.

content.plan_summary: You have discovered a hidden key that may unlock new areas of the facility. Investigate further to find out what it opens.
content.narrative: As you begin to search the lab equipment thoroughly, you notice a faint glimmer beneath some papers. Digging deeper, you uncover a small, rusted key that might be significant. It seems to suggest there are more secrets hidden within the Lab of Shadows.

content.reasoning: Searching the lab equipment thoroughly does not directly advance any unresolved clues or red herrings, but it is a logical action that could yield useful information without disrupting the ongoing investigation.
